Operation 'cloudscheduler.projects.locations.jobs.run' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary was empty and description lacked critical details. Added: (1) clear action verb and context for AI agents, (2) explanation of concurrent execution behavior (important side effect), (3) return value specification, (4) clarification that configuration is not modified. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Forces a job to run now. When this method is called, Cloud Scheduler will dispatch the job, even if the job is already running.
data.summary_suggestion: Force a scheduled job to execute immediately
data.description_suggestion: Triggers immediate execution of a specified job, bypassing its normal schedule. The job will be dispatched even if it is currently running, potentially creating concurrent executions. Returns an Operation resource representing the job execution. This action does not modify the job's configuration or schedule.
data.reasoning: Original summary was empty and description lacked critical details. Added: (1) clear action verb and context for AI agents, (2) explanation of concurrent execution behavior (important side effect), (3) return value specification, (4) clarification that configuration is not modified. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'cloudscheduler.projects.locations.jobs.list' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary was empty and description was extremely vague. Enhanced with: (1) specific action and scope, (2) pagination support details, (3) return value structure, (4) mention of filtering/sorting capabilities. This enables AI agents to understand the operation's purpose, how to handle large result sets, and what data structure to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: List all scheduled jobs in a location
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all jobs in the specified location. Supports pagination through optional page_size and page_token parameters. Returns a ListJobsResponse containing an array of Job objects and a next_page_token for retrieving additional results. Results can be filtered and sorted based on job properties.
data.reasoning: Original summary was empty and description was extremely vague. Enhanced with: (1) specific action and scope, (2) pagination support details, (3) return value structure, (4) mention of filtering/sorting capabilities. This enables AI agents to understand the operation's purpose, how to handle large result sets, and what data structure to expect.

message: Operation 'cloudscheduler.projects.locations.jobs.create' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary was empty and description was minimal. Improved with: (1) clear action and scope, (2) required input fields and schema reference, (3) return value details, (4) important side effect (job becomes active immediately), (5) size constraint. This provides AI agents with sufficient context to determine if they should use this operation and what parameters are necessary.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new job in the specified location with the provided configuration. The request body must contain a Job object with required fields including name, schedule, and target configuration (AppEngineHttpTarget or HttpTarget). Returns the created Job object with all fields populated, including the server-generated name if not provided. The job will be immediately active and begin executing according to its schedule. Maximum job size is 1MB.
data.reasoning: Original summary was empty and description was minimal. Improved with: (1) clear action and scope, (2) required input fields and schema reference, (3) return value details, (4) important side effect (job becomes active immediately), (5) size constraint. This provides AI agents with sufficient context to determine if they should use this operation and what parameters are necessary.

message: Operation 'cloudscheduler.operations.delete' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about the distinction between deletion and cancellation, which is critical for AI agents to choose the correct operation. Added clarification about the difference and reference to CancelOperation for better agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Deletes a long-running operation. This method indicates that the client is no longer interested in the operation result. It does not cancel the operation. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a long-running operation and removes it from the system. This method indicates that the client is no longer interested in the operation result. Note: This does not cancel the operation itself; use CancelOperation to cancel an in-progress operation. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about the distinction between deletion and cancellation, which is critical for AI agents to choose the correct operation. Added clarification about the difference and reference to CancelOperation for better agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.
data.summary_suggestion: Get the latest state of an operation
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is clear and complete, explaining the purpose, use case (polling), and expected behavior. Summary added to provide concise action-oriented statement.

message: Operation 'cloudscheduler.projects.locations.jobs.patch' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. Missing summary. Description lacks clarity about input expectations (partial vs full updates) and doesn't clearly explain what fields can be updated. Enhanced to clarify partial update support and input requirements for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Updates a job. If successful, the updated Job is returned. If the job does not exist, `NOT_FOUND` is returned. If UpdateJob does not successfully return, it is possible for the job to be in an Job.State.UPDATE_FAILED state. A job in this state may not be executed. If this happens, retry the UpdateJob request until a successful response is received.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing job's configuration. Accepts a Job object with fields to be updated. Returns the updated Job object on success. Returns NOT_FOUND if the job does not exist. If the update fails, the job may enter UPDATE_FAILED state and will not execute; retry the request until successful. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks clarity about input expectations (partial vs full updates) and doesn't clearly explain what fields can be updated. Enhanced to clarify partial update support and input requirements for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'cloudscheduler.operations.cancel' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Missing summary. Description is verbose and could be clearer about the asynchronous nature and state transitions. Simplified to emphasize that this is a request (not guaranteed), clarified the resulting state, and improved flow for AI agent understanding of operation lifecycle.

data.current_description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of `1`, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.
data.summary_suggestion: Request cancellation of a long-running operation
data.description_suggestion: Requests asynchronous cancellation of a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel, but success is not guaranteed. The operation is not deleted; instead, it transitions to a CANCELLED state with an Operation.error value. Use GetOperation to poll the operation status and verify whether cancellation succeeded or the operation completed despite the cancellation request. Returns UNIMPLEMENTED if the server doesn't support this method.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is verbose and could be clearer about the asynchronous nature and state transitions. Simplified to emphasize that this is a request (not guaranteed), clarified the resulting state, and improved flow for AI agent understanding of operation lifecycle.

message: Operation 'cloudscheduler.projects.locations.jobs.pause' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Missing summary. Description is repetitive and lacks clarity about preconditions and return value. Restructured to clearly state the precondition (must be ENABLED), the action, the resulting state, and the return value for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Pauses a job. If a job is paused then the system will stop executing the job until it is re-enabled via ResumeJob. The state of the job is stored in state; if paused it will be set to Job.State.PAUSED. A job must be in Job.State.ENABLED to be paused.
data.description_suggestion: Pauses an enabled job, stopping the system from executing it until resumed. The job's state transitions to Job.State.PAUSED. Only jobs in Job.State.ENABLED can be paused. Use ResumeJob to re-enable the job. Returns the updated Job object on success.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is repetitive and lacks clarity about preconditions and return value. Restructured to clearly state the precondition (must be ENABLED), the action, the resulting state, and the return value for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'cloudscheduler.projects.locations.jobs.resume' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Missing summary. Description is repetitive and lacks clarity about preconditions and return value. Restructured to clearly state the precondition (must be PAUSED), the action, the resulting state, and the return value for better AI agent interpretability. Improved consistency with pause operation description.

data.current_description: Resume a job. This method reenables a job after it has been Job.State.PAUSED. The state of a job is stored in Job.state; after calling this method it will be set to Job.State.ENABLED. A job must be in Job.State.PAUSED to be resumed.
data.description_suggestion: Resumes a paused job, re-enabling the system to execute it on schedule. The job's state transitions from Job.State.PAUSED to Job.State.ENABLED. Only jobs in Job.State.PAUSED can be resumed. Returns the updated Job object on success.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is repetitive and lacks clarity about preconditions and return value. Restructured to clearly state the precondition (must be PAUSED), the action, the resulting state, and the return value for better AI agent interpretability. Improved consistency with pause operation description.
